---
title: "WHERE CAN YOU FIND E.T.?"
author: "Tyler Guerrero, Emanuel Padilla, Cameron Snyder"
output:
  revealjs::revealjs_presentation:
    theme: black          
    transition: slide      
    self_contained: false 
    center: false
    reveal_options:
      slideNumber: true
      scrollable: true     
---
```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

# slide 1 {data-background="ETfinger.jpg"}
- introduction 
- questions (problem statement & subquestions)

# Slide 2 {data-background="ETfinger.jpg"}
- get ready slide: libraries functions used

# Slide 3 {data-background="ETfinger.jpg"}
- unfiltered data
- data key terms
-0
-
-
-
-
-
-
-
-
-
-
- 
-
-heyyy
-
-
-
-
```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(dplyr)
library(lubridate) #for the mdy()
library(ggplot2)


```


-

# slide 4 {data-background="ETfinger.jpg"}
- answering our questions
- include our filtered data, relationships, plots/graphs. tables, etc

#slide 5 {data-background="ETfinger.jpg"}
- summary
